title: HHXUUAN 6 Pieces M6 Heavy Duty Square Eye Plate Pad Hooks,304 Stainless Metal Suspension U Hooks with 24 Screws for Wall Ceiling Hanging
features: Package Content:You will receive 6 pieces square pad eye plate with 24 pieces matching screws to facilitate your use and to meet your replacements.

Quality Material：Made of high-quality 304 stainless steel, wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, rust-resistant, and scratch-resistant, durable, and have a long service life. The surface is processed with wire drawing treatment, high gloss and touch smoothly.

Powerful Load-bearing:Ring diameter is 6mm, strong and powerful. The wall hooks for hanging fit together and works well with ropes, chains and straps for versatile binding, rigging and anchoring hardware.

Easy to Use:The square eye plate pad hooks is easy to use, you just need to select the position you want, then push the screws through the hole and tighten them with a screwdriver. It's easy and convenient for you to install on solid walls, ceilings, floors, and more.

Wide Application:The square pad eye plates with hooks are great for suspension training straps, gymnastic Rings, yoga swings hammocks, marine deck hardware, decking rope, shade sail, decorative ropes and nets, exercise resistance bands, hiking, indoor outdoor equipment gear etc.
